name: Mocha Mousse Slice
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the base and sides of a 23cm square baking dish with foil.
2. Cover the bottom of the prepared dish with a layer of sponge finger biscuits.
3. Brush the biscuits with half of the combined coffee and water.
4. In a heatproof bowl, melt white chocolate over simmering water. Allow to cool slightly.
5. Stir in cream. Pour half of the chocolate and cream mixture over the biscuits.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 10 minutes.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 with remaining biscuits, coffee mixture, and white chocolate mixture.
8. Spread the mousse evenly over the biscuits.
9. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight until firm.
10. Decorate slice with whipped cream dusted cocoa and serve with strawberries if desired.
Mocha Mousse:
1. In a heatproof bowl, melt dark chocolate and butter over simmering water.
2. Cool slightly, then stir in cream, egg yolks, and liqueur (Kahlua or Tia Maria).
3. Beat extra cream until firm peaks form.
4. Fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture in two batches.
Note: Best results with high-quality dark chocolate and white eating chocolate. Not suitable for freezing. Suitable for microwave use.
